original_prompt: refine schema for maximum normalization based on provided instructions (item_catalog, items, tech_id, etc.)

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update server.js SCHEMAS to reflect the newly specified refined architecture (item_catalog, items, stock_take_logs, etc.).
tasks.testing_criteria: SCHEMAS object matches the new strict fields.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update firebase-blueprint.json to match the refined architecture.
subtasks_required: Rewrite firebase-blueprint.json schemas and firestore paths
tasks.testing_criteria: Blueprint contains correctly named schemas and references.

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Ensure blueprint is valid JSON
Do-Pebble: Update frontend APIs / Views to match new field names if changed (e.g. stock_takes -> stock_take_logs, item_catalog, etc.) so UI doesn't break.
subtasks_required: Find and replace changed collection references in views
tasks.testing_criteria: Frontend code points to the new schema/fields.
App builds, views align with normalized schema.
